description: Focus on the design of the Fitbit Versa 3/4 strap, from Issinlky, a brand of accessories for smart watches - The details of the fine grinding and polishing process combined with high quality stainless steel materials give you an elegant texture, Give your smartwatch a whole new look and a more comfortable skin experience. - Fit wrist size 5.31 "-7.87" (135mm-200mm). - Fashionable and elegant appearance, can be used as a gift for your family and friends. Compatible Models: - Fitbit Versa 4 - Fitbit Versa 3 - Fitbit Sense 2 - Fitbit Sense Package: 1 * Fitbit Versa 4 Replacement Strap (not include Smart Watch)
